end else if y<339062+13271090 then if y<-1041142+14447771 then s=v(s)q=v(q)y=170556+14842183 Y=v(Y)H=nil c=v(c)g=v(g)b=v(b)else o=e(817703-753338)y=14649242-711956 K=x[o]R=K end else if J=u[U]D=X..J A=nil M[T]=D end else g=not L J=J+i R=J<=U R=g and R g=J>=U g=L and g R=g or R g=9111648-(-516196)y=R and g R=3183252-1023131 y=y or R end else if y<15881437-734407 then K=w(10214314-(-170927),{})R=e(-556220+620561)u=e(261019-196677)y=x[R]A=e(-348042-(-412374))C=h[z[794085-794081]]M=x[u]V=x[A]A={V(K)}p={B(A)}V=-231776+231778 L=n(7019602-(-560405),{g;X,k;K,o,D})D=v(D)T=L G=e(-969008+1033337)O=20540294000327-821611 end end end y=#Z return B(R)end,function(x,e)local B=M(e)local t=function(t,z,Z)return y(x,{t;z,Z},e,B)end return t end return(G(2594056-631716,{}))(B(R))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[e(-699454+763819)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
